name: Gururumon

signature_move.name: Chaos Fire
signature_move.description: 12Spews high-temperature flames from its mouth.Strikes the ground to cause dark fire to rise at its enemy.

description: A Beast Digimon that is very similar to Garurumon . As a fiendish Digimon that lives in the dark, it is a nuisance who causes trouble everywhere. Its Special Move is high-temperature flames spewed from its mouth ( Chaos Fire ).
